AdminProfile.title: Admin Profile
AdminProfile.description: Defines the data structure for an administrator's profile. This information is stored when an admin user is created.

id.description: The user's unique ID, which must match their Firebase Authentication UID.

name.description: The full name of the administrator.

email.description: The administrator's email address, used for identification.

role.description: The user's role, fixed to 'admin' for authorization purposes.

RegisteredVisitorProfile.title: Registered Visitor Profile
RegisteredVisitorProfile.description: Defines the data structure for a registered visitor's profile. This is created when a visitor logs in or is manually entered.

id.description: The user's unique ID, which must match their Firebase Authentication UID if they are a registered user.

name.description: The full name of the visitor.

email.description: The visitor's email address, used for identification and communication.

role.description: The user's role, fixed to 'visitor' for authorization purposes.

VisitorEntry.title: Visitor Entry
VisitorEntry.description: Defines the data structure for a single visitor log entry, capturing all details of a visit.

id.description: A unique identifier for this specific visitor entry record.

timestamp.description: The precise date and time when the visit was logged.

purpose.description: The reason for the visit (e.g., Research, Study, Event).

entryType.description: The method used to log the entry (e.g., manual input, RFID card scan).

registeredVisitorId.description: The UID of the registered visitor, linking this entry to a specific user profile if applicable.

manualEntryVisitorName.description: The name of the visitor, used specifically for manual entries where a profile might not exist.

loggedByAdminUserId.description: The UID of the admin who manually created the entry, for auditing purposes.

auth.description: Configures Firebase Authentication to only allow Email/Password sign-in.

/admins/{adminId}.description: A top-level collection in Firestore to store all administrator user profiles. The document ID for each admin is their Firebase Authentication UID.

/registeredVisitors/{visitorId}.description: A top-level collection in Firestore to store all registered visitor profiles. The document ID for each visitor is their Firebase Authentication UID.

/visitorEntries/{entryId}.description: A top-level collection in Firestore that serves as the master log for all visitor entries from all sources.
